key.name: dsn
key.description: PostgreSQL connection string (libpq format). Example: dbname=zodb user=zodb password=zodb host=localhost port=5433

key.name: name
key.description: Storage name (used in sort keys).

key.name: history-preserving
key.description: Enable history-preserving mode.

key.name: blob-temp-dir
key.description: Directory for temporary blob files. Auto-created if omitted.

key.name: cache-local-mb
key.description: DEPRECATED since 1.12.0. Alias for cache-shared-mb; emits a DeprecationWarning when set. Before 1.12.0 this was the per-instance cache budget; it is now the process-wide shared cache budget, so existing deployments automatically see the same total memory footprint redistributed into a single cache.

key.name: cache-shared-mb
key.description: Size of the process-wide shared object cache in megabytes. One cache per process, shared across all ZODB Connections. Caches load() results (pickle bytes) to avoid repeated PostgreSQL round-trips and JSONB transcoding. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 256.

key.name: cache-per-connection-mb
key.description: Size of the per-connection L1 object cache in megabytes. A small lock-free cache ahead of the shared cache for hot-path reads. Set to 0 to rely entirely on the shared cache. Default: 16.

key.name: pool-size
key.description: Minimum number of connections in the instance connection pool. Set to 0 for on-demand creation. Default: 1.

key.name: pool-max-size
key.description: Maximum number of connections in the instance connection pool. Default: 10.

key.name: pool-timeout
key.description: Connection pool acquisition timeout in seconds. Raises StorageError if a connection cannot be acquired within this time.

key.name: cache-warm-pct
key.description: Percentage of cache size to pre-warm at startup. Set to 0 to disable. The warmer learns which objects are loaded first after each restart and pre-loads them on the next startup. Default: 10.

key.name: cache-warm-decay
key.description: Score decay factor per restart cycle. Controls how quickly old access patterns fade. 0.8 means scores from 10 restarts ago have 10% of their original weight. Default: 0.8.

key.name: blob-threshold
key.description: Blobs larger than this are stored in S3 (if configured). Blobs smaller than this stay in PostgreSQL bytea. Set to 0 to send all blobs to S3. Default: 100KB. Requires s3-bucket-name to be set.

key.name: s3-bucket-name
key.description: S3 bucket name for large blob storage. If omitted, all blobs are stored in PostgreSQL bytea.

key.name: s3-prefix
key.description: S3 key prefix for namespace isolation.

key.name: s3-endpoint-url
key.description: S3 endpoint URL (for MinIO, Ceph, or other S3-compatible stores).

key.name: s3-region
key.description: AWS region name.

key.name: s3-access-key
key.description: AWS access key ID. Uses boto3 credential chain if omitted.

key.name: s3-secret-key
key.description: AWS secret access key. Uses boto3 credential chain if omitted.

key.name: s3-use-ssl
key.description: Enable SSL for S3 connections. Default: true.

key.name: blob-cache-dir
key.description: Local cache directory for S3 blobs. Uses blob-temp-dir if omitted. Recommended for production to avoid repeated S3 downloads.

key.name: blob-cache-size
key.description: Maximum size of local blob cache. Default: 1GB.
